transcript.text:
(A master's recipe) This restaurant was made with a master's recipe
(1st-Gen master / 2nd-Gen daughter) that was directly passed down, who is the 1st-Gen
(We'll show you a taste of buckwheat that is on another level) and has 60 years of making buckwheat
Looks good!
You can't eat that...
(Steal the heart of the 1st-Gen master...!)
(Sir, I am a master of mukbang...!!!)
(She's a better eater than I thought)
One pan more?!
One pan more!!!
(A buckwheat disappearing show)
(shown to the 1st-Gen master)
(You gotta give her credit...)
(These days, with a slight spring breeze)
Hello, everyone
I am here today in Bongcheon-dong

(Today's menu) Ta-da, I'm here to eat buckwheat in a pan!
I'll tell you a bit about this place
It's been almost 60 years!
The recipe was passed down directly from Korea's 1st-Gen buckwheat master
and that's how the restaurant is run
I wonder how the 1st-Gen buckwheat is going to taste...
(Let's go) Let's go inside
(Located in Gwanak-gu, Seoul)
(Restaurant specializing in buckwheat udon "Yeonsoba")
Hello!
- Oh, hello!! - Hello
- I'm a fan... - Really?
Thank you
Whoa, what's that?
(Dumpling skin made out of buckwheat!) They're dumplings?! That looks so good
- Are they buckwheat dumplings? - Yes, it's our buckwheat dumplings

(Scan!) Here's the menu
(Various types of buckwheat dishes) What are hot buckwheat noodles? That's cool
They even have spicy buckwheat noodles
I kind of want buckwheat noodles in a pan today, though
(Found a tonkatsu dish as well!) Tonkatsu!
This place specializes in buckwheat noodles in a pan
(This person is the 1st-Gen master of buckwheat noodles, with 60 years of experience) I'm old so I don't remember much, but I did it for a long time
Of course there are a lot of other dishes but today,
(Let's go with buckwheat noodles in a pan!!) I will eat buckwheat noodles in a pan
I should look up how many buckwheat noodle mukbangs I did so far
(8 pans + cheese tonkatsu / 10 pans + yubu sushi / 5 pans + 4 pans of dumplings) I ate about 10 pans
Wow, I did eat a lot, that's quite impressive!
Oh, today,
(Shouldn't say that in front of elders) since I have aged,
I'll keep it simple...
About 5 pans?

Excuse me!
Are the portions huge?
- It's just normal... - Normal?
How many are you going to eat...?
I'm contemplating
I think...
(Knows Tzuyang well) you can eat about 10 pans
Should we start with 5 pans for now?
Sure, I'll get 5 pans of buckwheat noodles
- Plus tonkatsu and dumplings - Okay
(Done ordering) Thank you
(She's gonna eat that all...?)
(Buckwheat dish that was directly passed down from 1st-Gen!)
(Special noodles with suppleness and chewiness)
(Broth that was completely homemade)
(and tonkatsu that is sure to be crispy)

(Plus, buckwheat dumplings!)
(The genuine 1st-Gen buckwheat taste! Buckwheat in a pan is all ready!)
(Welcome) Thank you
(Thanks to the delicious-looking food...)
(Already got sauce on herself...LOL)
(All ready) Looks good
They gave me a lot of buckwheat noodles
The tonkatsu is huge
(Buckwheat dumplings are so shiny) And the buckwheat dumplings have a unique color
Bon appetit!
Wow, it looks good
How do you eat all that?
Gosh, my life's wish was to have Tzuyang here
(Shy) Oh, really?!
My wish came true!
The owner looks so young

- Age 54 - Whoa! Really?!
(Looks so young and pretty...!) You look so young
(Mukbang starts with a wholesome atmosphere!)
Will it overflow?
I think it will
(A bunch of buckwheat in the refreshing broth) It'll overflow
To here
(Thinly sliced green onions)
(and minced radish goes in!) Put in a bit of pear
No, it's not pear, it's radish!
I'll take a sip of the broth
Oh, it's so strong! It's so delicious
Wow, this...
The buckwheat broth is so good...!
It's so flavorful, it's no joke
Producer, did you eat this before?

Yeah, I ate it about 5 years ago
(It's seriously so good) It's so delicious
Wow, this is a really good restaurant!
The noodles
are thin but they are really supple
(She's so certain about it LOL) The broth is really good, the flavors are no joke
Wow, the noodles are really chewy and nice too!
Next is tonkatsu!
(Everyone, can you see this?)
The fried batter is really thin, and the meat is very thick and tender
Oh, it's really good
(Another bunch since it's really good!) The broth itself is so flavorful, it's no joke
I'll try one dumpling too
They made the dumplings themselves
(It's so good that it's making me angry) It's all good
Since it's buckwheat dumplings,

I can really taste the buckwheat
and the inside is very moist
(Putting it in the broth...?) Let me dip the tonkatsu here
It looks good
The fried batter is crispy!
(She's bound to dip every food...) Maybe I should dip the dumpling into here too
Oh, the dumplings are good!
(Cleared one pan of buckwheat noodles in a flash!)
I'll add a little bit of it
(But it's long, so it's not possible....) I can't though, the noodles are too long
I'll get a little bit
Dip it a little bit
This time, I'll put it in a fresh broth
Wow, it's strong! It's really strong
Compared to an ordinary buckwheat broth,
it's similar yet slightly different!

Wow, it's good
Should I add a bit of mustard?
(So little) I don't usually add mustard or wasabi
I'll dip it in a bit
A little bit more?
A bit more?
(So timid)
I can taste the mustard!!!
I'm not repelled by it, though
When the weather gets nicer and it's summer,
(Let's come here again!) I'll really be reminded of this
Wow, it's good
(Cleared the 2nd pan!)
The one with mustard makes my sinuses cleared
So I'll pass on the soup!!
Does it suit your taste?

Oh, it's so good
I got the recipe passed down from my 1st-Gen father
- It's really good...! - Oh, really?
- Thank you so much - Seriously, you're the best
Oh, how many years have you been making buckwheat?
- We've been doing this for over 60 years - Over 60 years?
(See a halo behind him...) 1st-Gen
(Gotta admit this is the best) But seriously, it's really good
There
(Bunch of broth, bunch of buckwheat) Oh, it's overflowing
(Protect my tonkatsu at all costs) I need to savor the tonkatsu
(Get every last strand of noodles)
(Cleared)
(I know her and she always eats that much, father...)
(Her sleeve is a mess with the sauce LOLOL)
It's good

(Why are you smelling it? LOL)
(The food was here... but not anymore...) I finished it too quickly, I think
I should've ordered 2 tonkatsu... I want more...
Come to think of it, I didn't drink anything!
No wonder I didn't feel full!
(I have only one pan left...)
(The last tonkatsu that she was saving)
(Seeing it in person, she eats better than I thought...)
My tonkatsu
Saving it was a fail!
Sorry...cabbage!
It's good
(Getting the last strand as well)
(We are watching you...)
I feel like someone's glaring at me...
You eat it so deliciously...

One pan more!!
Should I eat one pan more?!
- (Yeah, you should) - (Yeah, you should)
Let's go! Okay, one pan more!
One more pan, please!
One pan really came out LOL thank you
(Eat lots)
(Below the 5 empty pans...)
(Peekaboo)
(One more pan they gave me)
(So much love LOLOL) They gave me so much
(Is something wrong with the bowl?) A long time ago, I...
promoted this bowl in Ulleungdo!
(Bowl she received as product placement LOL) It's product placement!
Wow, this is!
Brass bowl

(The product placement back then was so funny LOL) It's a brass bowl in which you can enjoy refreshing soup
Is this right...?
(Burst out laughing LOL)
It keeps the broth cold, not warm...!
(The father's must-have) My dad really loves the brass bowl right now
Brass bowl that is great for alcoholic drinks
(Are you doing well, sir...?) What did he say? Brass bowl LOL
Last dumpling! I was gonna save this
(It's good)
(Speed it up!)
(Cleanly cleared the 1st-Gen master's buckwheat noodles!)
Where does it all go...?
That's so impressive...
I really enjoyed the food, sir!
(Even the 1st-Gen owner is satisfied because she ate so well) You eat well
That was another great meal!

How do you eat so much yet stay so fragile?
How many meals does she eat in a day?
Two to four meals
(Succeeded in surprising the buckwheat master!) Two to four meals?!
